changelog.en: CRITICAL: sdkVersion fix (Processing failed), Missing Capability Listener (setable:false), timer fallback, battery restore, duplicate method fix, HOBEIAN ZG-301Z, NFKD normalize, 87 fingerprints restored, Polos validator
changelog.fr: CRITIQUE: sdkVersion (Processing failed), Missing Capability Listener, fallback timer, batterie, HOBEIAN, NFKD, 87 fingerprints, Polos

changelog.summary: Documentation Finalizer v8.0 - Forum analysis, multi-manufacturer rules, device additions

changes.description: KNOWLEDGE_CACHE.json v8.0: Added forum findings section, multi-manufacturer rules, forum-based device addition workflow
CORE_RULES.md v5.0: Added R59-R61 (forum/multi-manufacturer rules) + FM1-FM3 (forum & multi-manufacturer rules)
Forum analysis fixes - fingerbot collision revert, driver compose improvements
Forum issues #2091 #5472 - device routing and flow card integrity fixes
Updated project statistics: 430 drivers, 533 lib files, 565 scripts, 334 docs
Added 3 new enrichment rules: R59-R61 for forum-based device additions
Added 3 new forum/multi-manufacturer rules: FM1-FM3
Updated git history with latest commits and key decisions

changelog.summary: Documentation v7.0 - KNOWLEDGE_CACHE v7.0, CORE_RULES v4.0 (R1-R58), 4 new docs, 42 modules documented

changes.description: KNOWLEDGE_CACHE.json v7.0: 42 modules documented, R1-R58 rules, presence/battery health/features module coverage
CORE_RULES.md v4.0: Added R43-R58 enrichment rules (presence, battery health, groups, features, energy)
docs/ARCHITECTURE.md: Comprehensive architecture overview with 11-layer pipeline, class hierarchy, protocols
docs/MODULES.md: Complete documentation of 42 modules across 10 categories
docs/WORKFLOWS.md: All 40 GitHub Actions workflows documented with schedules and purposes
docs/SCRIPTS.md: All 93 scripts documented with categories and usage
Updated project statistics: 429 drivers, 4304 FPs, 4138 flow cards, 156 capabilities
Added 16 new rules: R43-R58 for advanced feature modules
Added 2 new anti-patterns: AP13 (deprecated HybridSwitchBase), AP14 (missing positionInvert)
Updated CREDITS.md with new module sources and Homey Community Forum

changelog.summary: TITAN V5 GOD-MODE Final - Image conformity, documentation enrichment, R1-R42 + CP1-CP10 + IC1-IC4

changes.description: KNOWLEDGE_CACHE.json v6.0: All 10 modules documented, R1-R42 rules, CP1-CP10 crash prevention, IC1-IC4 image conformity
CORE_RULES.md v3.0: Added IC1-IC4 image conformity rules (SVG 960x960 viewBox, no gradients, no rasters)
TITAN_FINAL_REPORT.md: Comprehensive final report with all phases, modules, fixes, and conformities
CREDITS.md: Added athombv/homey-vectors-public, Joolee/Homey-SVG-Icons, Homey Community Forum
Image conformity audit: 430/430 drivers with SVG icons, app icon compliant (100x100, no gradients, no rasters)

All 10 TITAN modules verified: CircuitBreaker, ValueConverterRegistry, CapabilityMapCache, BatchCapabilityUpdater, DPCache, safeLogger, ConnectionStateTracker, RetryWithBackoff, CrashPrevention, ErrorClassifier

changelog.summary: CrashPrevention utilities - Comprehensive crash prevention for all async operations

changes.description: CrashPrevention.js: Comprehensive crash prevention utilities (safeAsync, safePromise, guardDestroyed, guardHomey, safeTimeout, safeInterval, safeCleanup, safeSetCapability, safeTriggerFlow, safeSendCommand, withRetry)
CORE_RULES.md updated with R42: CrashPrevention Utilities rule
CORE_RULES.md updated with CP1-CP10: Crash Prevention Rules section
CORE_RULES.md updated with Crash Pattern Analysis Summary section

Identified 7 crash patterns: .then() without .catch() (59), empty catch handlers (968), unsafe setCapabilityValue (87), missing _destroyed guard (45+), missing super.onDeleted() (20+), raw setTimeout/setInterval (100+), unhandled promise rejections (14)

changelog.summary: TITAN Protocol V5 - ConnectionStateTracker, CORE_RULES R37-R41, documentation enrichment

changes.description: ConnectionStateTracker: WiFi connection state tracking with history, uptime stats, and state persistence
CORE_RULES.md updated with R37-R41: ConnectionStateTracker, RetryWithBackoff, ConnectionState Persistence, Connection Uptime Monitoring, ErrorClassifier Integration
KNOWLEDGE_CACHE.json updated to v5.1 with new module references and known issues
All violations verified clean: raw setCapabilityValue=0, console.log in drivers=0, raw setTimeout/setInterval=0

changelog.summary: TITAN Protocol v2 - Massive audit, 159 driver fixes, WiFi base class hardening

changes.description: TITAN Protocol v2: 7-agent parallel audit system (Investigator, Auditor, Architect, Automator + 3 verification agents)
CircuitBreaker module for TuyaCloudAPI fault tolerance
CircuitBreaker integrated into TuyaCloudAPI._request() - 5 failures = open, 30s reset
ValueConverterRegistry: Centralized DP value converters (Z2M-inspired pattern)
CapabilityMapCache: capabilityMap caching in onInit() to reduce GC pressure
BatchCapabilityUpdater: Batch capability updates with 50ms window to reduce UI overhead
DPCache: Per-device DP value cache for offline fallback (5min TTL, LRU eviction)
safeLogger: Safe logger utility replacing console.log fallbacks in lib/ utilities
ErrorClassifier: Added isRetryable(), getRetryDelay(), withRetry() for automatic retry with exponential backoff
TuyaLocalClient: Offline command queuing - commands queued when disconnected, flushed on reconnect (5min expiry)
TuyaLocalClient: Connection state tracking via 'connection-state' event (disconnected/connecting/connected/reconnecting)
TuyaLocalDevice: Offline mode - continues operating with cached state, queues commands for retry
ai-monthly-audit.yml: Enhanced with AI-powered deep analysis (Claude/OpenAI/Gemini)
KNOWLEDGE_CACHE.json v2.0: Comprehensive project knowledge base with 667 URLs
Virtual presence detection + battery health intelligence
7 new hybrid drivers (fan_sensor, garage_door_sensor, heater_thermostat, etc.)
CRITICAL: TuyaLocalDevice.onDeleted() now calls super.onDeleted() - fixes TCP leak for ALL 29 WiFi drivers
CRITICAL: EweLinkLocalDevice.onDeleted() now calls super.onDeleted() - fixes TCP leak for ALL eWeLink drivers
CRITICAL: 159 driver files batch-fixed from raw setCapabilityValue to safeSetCapabilityValue
FIXED: TuyaLocalDevice._onData() raw setCapabilityValue replaced with safeSetCapabilityValue
FIXED: console.log fallback patterns in TuyaTimeSync, TuyaDataQuery, TuyaGatewayEmulator, DataRecoveryManager replaced with safeLogger
Forum issues #2091 #5472 + protection scripts + flow card integrity
Comprehensive button evolution + stable-v5 port + regression fixes
Comprehensive quality sweep - 607 files, zero violations
GitHub issues #388 #383 #420 #417 + fingerprint additions
CORE_RULES.md updated to v2.0 with R19-R31 enrichment rules
KNOWLEDGE_CACHE.json restructured with architecture, bugs, and external references
28 redundant GitHub Actions workflows archived to .archive/workflows-disabled/ (66 → 36 active)
77 drivers fixed with super.onDeleted() + _destroyed guard (resource leak prevention)
CapabilityMapCache integrated into BaseUnifiedDevice, TuyaZigbeeDevice, TuyaLocalDevice (WeakMap-based)
ValueConverterRegistry extended to 11 drivers (44 inline transforms replaced with boolean()/enumMap())
22 orphaned lib/ files deleted (~135 KB dead code removed)
20 dead scripts deleted (571 → 551 scripts)
tuya-dp-engine deleted (unused converter system, -63 KB)
16 console.log violations fixed in lib/ files
BaseUnifiedDevice:2955 fixed to use safeSetCapabilityValue
3 new validation scripts: check-destroyed-guard.js, check-super-ondeleted.js, check-circuit-breaker.js
